name: Hugues Bomokin
title: IT Professional & Solution Builder
shortBio: I build systems that think, automate, and scale — from AI agents to Flutter (mobile & web) apps to n8n workflows.
longBio: With 10+ years in telecom and network operations across multi-vendor environments (Nokia, Huawei, Cisco, 2G/3G/4G), I bring a rare combination of infrastructure depth and modern software skills. Today I build AI-powered automation systems, cross-platform  apps with Flutter, and intelligent workflow pipelines with n8n — always with a focus on solving real operational problems. Based in Ottawa, bilingual (FR/EN), and open to new opportunities.
